title: brachypeza zamboangensis
intro: Brachypeza zamboangensis is a species of plant in the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the Zamboanga cypress sedge. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory symptoms, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Brachypeza zamboangensis can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to treat a range of ailments.
